projects.description: For the first project of the year, we were tasked with creating a website in relation to the book that we had read over the summer. This project was mainly done as a refresher on what we learned the previous year.
This was the second project of the year, it was meant to also serve as a portfolio site for our second year in web design. It was, once again, a refresher.
We were told to be more creative with CSS for this project, namely with colors and fonts. It's meant to be a biography site for a celebrity of our choice.
This was the first site where JavaScript was implimented into any of my projects. It utilizes user input to generate a mad lib story.
This site utilizes JavaScript to generate a 'random' name using a user's input. The user is asked to input their name, and the site generates a name for them using multiple information input facets.
This project utilized a random number generator via Javascript to generate a computer decision after a user has picked theirs. The site then uses conditionals to determine the winner of the game.

This project utilizes random number generators and additional JavaScript methods to create a hangman game. User input is also used to  determine the difficulty of the game as well as inputting guesses/
